title: The Mountain Hermit
description: Deduce the mixing result from the clues.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing3+ing6=R-: both share R-), ing4=R+ (ing1+ing4=R+: both share R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G+ (ing1+ing3=G+: both share G+), ing4=G- (ing4+ing6=G-: both share G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B- (ing3 has B-), ing4=B+ (ing4+ing5=B+: both share B+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.
